title: Slafontaine
compiled_truth: Slafontaine is an external contact at [Globalp](companies/globalp). Over the corpus period (2000-09-25 to 2001-04-04), Slafontaine sent 4 and received 116 emails, totalling 120 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Arnold](people/john-arnold) (4).
